title: Local dashboard onboarding: profile + resume + searches

phases.name: plan
goals: When a user opens the dashboard, guide them through creating profile, uploading resume (PDF + plain text), and configuring searches
Avoid guessing: require explicit answers for required fields

phases.name: implementation
steps: Add /setup page served by dashboard-serve when config is missing
Add localhost JSON APIs for profile/searches/resume persistence
Add validation and safe merging (do not wipe unknown fields)
Add minimal UI for editing required fields

phases.name: verification
steps: Add API/flow smoke tests with temp APPLYPILOT_DIR
